use_cases: Display team member profiles on company about pages
Showcase staff members and their expertise on landing pages
Present team credentials and social links for recruitment purposes
Feature company leadership with animated card layouts
Highlight team skills and specializations with visual hierarchy
ai_summary: A dynamic team showcase section featuring member cards with gradient overlays, Framer Motion animations, and interactive hover effects. Displays team member profiles including name, role, bio, skills, location, and social links with spring-based motion transitions. Designed for SaaS and tech landing pages needing an engaging, animated team presentation.
